scores.correctness_notes: All three required sections (services, checks, log-targets) are correctly defined with proper fields. on-check-failure links service to check correctly. Extra fields like backoff-delay/factor/limit and kill-delay are valid Pebble service fields, not hallucinations.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — backoff-delay, backoff-factor, backoff-limit, kill-delay are real Pebble service parameters
